zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock於1240年4月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，他的父親Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock46歲，母親Mary Mearns21歲。他於1262年之前與Lady Katherine Maxwell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1298年7月22日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock于1240年4月1日出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾时，他的父亲Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock46岁，母亲Mary Mearns21岁。他于1262年之前与Lady Katherine Maxwell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1298年7月22日在苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock was born on 1 April 1240, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock, was 46 and his mother, Mary Mearns, was 21. He married Lady Katherine Maxwell before 1262. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 22 July 1298, in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock est né le 1 avril 1240, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mary Mearns, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Katherine Maxwell avant 1262. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1298, à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock am 1. April 1240 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock 46 und seine Mutter Mary Mearns 21. Er hat vor 1262 Lady Katherine Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 22. Juli 1298 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock è nato il il 1 aprile 1240 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Mary Mearns, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Katherine Maxwell prima del 1262. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 22 luglio 1298, nel Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverockが1240年4月1日にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverockは46歳，母Mary Mearnsは21歳であった。1262年以前にLady Katherine Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1298年7月22日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock(이)가 1240년 4월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Mearns(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1262년 이전 Lady Katherine Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1298년 7월 22일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 April 1240–22 July 1298: 1 de abril de 1240–22 de julho de 1298
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock nasceu em 1 de abril de 1240, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mary Mearns, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Katherine Maxwell antes 1262. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1298, em Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock родился 1 апреля 1240 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Mearns, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine Maxwell перед 1262 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 22 июля 1298 г. в местности фалкирк, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет.
